---
title: ""
format: html
---

<p style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
  <a href="cv.pdf" style="font-weight:600;">Download PDF CV</a>
</p>

::: {.cv-name}
James C. Butler
:::

::: {.cv-contact}
jamesccbutler@gmail.com · +353 089 250 5361 · Ireland · Dual UK / US citizen
:::

**Bioinformatics PhD candidate & Marie Curie Fellow** specializing in machine learning and generative AI for large-scale biological and healthcare data. Research experience with transformers, diffusion models, GANs, and statistical learning, with a strong foundation in applied statistics and interdisciplinary research.

## Education

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
PhD in Computer Science / Microbiology — *Marie Curie Fellow*, University College Cork
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2021--Present
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Advisor: *[Advisor name]*
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Thesis: *[PhD thesis title]*
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
MSc Applied Statistics & Datamining (Distinction), University of St Andrews
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2019--2020
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Advisor: *[Advisor name]*
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Thesis: *Synthetic Data for Training Convolutional Neural Networks* (18.7 / 20)
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
BA Economics & Visual and Environmental Studies, Harvard University
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2011--2015
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Selected quantitative training: econometrics, statistical methods, computational analysis
:::
:::

## Professional Experience

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
Imperial College London
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2020--2021
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
*Research Assistant* — Designed and conducted statistical analyses to identify systemic issues across health and social care systems; evaluated interventions and outcomes using applied statistical methods.
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
DMP Statistical Solutions UK Ltd
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2020--2022
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
*Statistical Consultant* — Delivered applied statistical analyses and reports for industry clients including L’Oréal; designed a custom data-driven web application for Raymond James.
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
Le Grand Verre Wines
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2015--2019
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
*Co-founder; CMO; Partner; President; Board Member* — Built and scaled an international e-commerce business; led strategy, marketing, and fundraising; secured external investment; managed cross-border operations and partnerships.
:::
:::

## Technical Skills

::: {.cv-sub}
**Programming:** Python, R
:::

::: {.cv-sub}
**Machine Learning:** Transformers, diffusion models, GANs, representation learning
:::

::: {.cv-sub}
**Statistics:** GLMs, multivariate analysis, hypothesis testing
:::

::: {.cv-sub}
**Tools:** Linux, Git, Shiny
:::

## Languages

::: {.cv-sub}
Spanish — Intermediate
:::

## Interests

::: {.cv-sub}
Endurance running (3 marathons, 3:13 PR), music, travel
:::
